name: Brown and White Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, fry the bacon until it is partially crisp but still limp.
2. Stir in the brown rice and cook over medium heat until the rice is light golden brown.
3. Add the bacon and browned rice to the Crock-Pot with the green onions, mushrooms, white rice, and broth. Stir well.
4. Cover and cook on Low for 6 to 8 hours or on High for 2 1/2 to 3 1/2 hours.
5. Before serving, stir well and add salt if needed.
6. Garnish with toasted almonds and grated Parmesan cheese.
